steps.title: Calculate party favor expenses
steps.content: Dana bought 9 packages at \$4 each: $$9 \times 4 = 36$$ dollars spent on party favors.

steps.title: Find muffin count from remaining budget
steps.content: Budget remaining for muffins: $$84 - 36 = 48$$ dollars. Since each muffin costs \$1, she bought 48 muffins.
